# PDF Converter — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

## About
PDF Converter is a free, professional online PDF toolkit available at https://pdfconverter.app.
It allows users to convert, merge, split, compress, and extract data from PDF files — 
directly in the browser with no signup required.

## Features
- Convert PDF to Word (.docx)
- Convert PDF to Excel (.xlsx)
- Convert PDF to CSV
- Convert PDF to plain text (.txt)
- Merge multiple PDFs into one
- Split PDFs by page range
- Compress PDFs to reduce file size
- Extract tables from PDFs
- OCR scanned PDFs (powered by Tesseract)
- Batch process multiple PDFs at once

## Technology
Built with Python, Streamlit, pdfplumber, PyMuPDF, pytesseract, OpenCV, and Pillow.

## Languages
English and French (multilingual support)

## Privacy
Files are processed in-memory and never stored on the server.

## Target Keywords
PDF Converter, PDF to Word, PDF to Excel, free PDF converter, PDF OCR tool,
extract tables from PDF, scanned PDF to text, convert PDF online, merge PDF, split PDF

## Contact
Website: https://pdfconverter.app
